results.question: Which countries have places with more than two caves?
results.gold_sparql: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dbo:publisher res:GMT_Games }
results.predicted_sparql:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT ?country WHERE { ?country dbo:hasPlace { ?place a dbo:CaveSystem . ?place dbo:numberOfCaves ?caves . FILTER(?caves > 2) } }
